tool_args.label: Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) Expansion 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) had been activated on an additional twelve routes had been established, to a total of nineteen routes.

payload.description: Automated Bus Lane Enforcement activated on an additional twelve routes to a total of nineteen routes, resulting in faster service, fewer collisions, and increased customer satisfaction along these routes.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) had been activated on an additional twelve routes had been established, to a total of nineteen routes. He stated that there is faster service, fewer collisions, and increased customer satisfaction along these routes.

tool_args.label: New Flyer All-Electric Bus Procurement (2023)
tool_args.raw_text: modification relates to the contract with New Flyer for the purchase of forty all electric buses. The modification extends the delivery schedule to allow New Flyer time to develop, test and install an early-warning detection system for thermal events on each bus prior to delivery.

payload.description: Contract modification with New Flyer for purchase of forty all electric buses, extending delivery schedule for development and installation of an early-warning detection system for thermal events.

evidence_refs.source_quote: procurement package, which included one action in the estimated amount of $4.8 million

contract with New Flyer for the purchase of forty all electric buses. The modification extends the delivery schedule to allow New Flyer time to develop, test and install an early-warning detection system for thermal events on each bus prior to delivery.

tool_args.label: NYPD Traffic Enforcement Initiative for Bus Lanes (2023)
tool_args.raw_text: NYPD enforcement initiative that targets cars parked illegally in right of way lanes and cars in the bus lanes. this initiative began in Queens, has expanded to the Bronx, and will expand to Brooklyn in August.

payload.project_name: NYPD Traffic Enforcement Initiative for Bus Lanes
payload.description: NYPD enforcement initiative targeting cars parked illegally in right of way lanes and cars in bus lanes. Began in Queens, expanded to the Bronx, expanding to Brooklyn in August.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Frank Annicaro ... reported on an initiative to increase the speed of bus service in areas where ABLE has not yet been activated. He explained an NYPD enforcement initiative that targets cars parked illegally in right of way lanes and cars in the bus lanes. He indicated that this initiative began in Queens, has expanded to the Bronx, and will expand to Brooklyn in August.
